title: panicum altum
intro: Panicum altum, also known as P. virgatum, is a type of perennial grass native to Africa and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Panicum altum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat ailments such as colds, flu, and skin irritations.
